root.sql: select sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.count_01 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.amout_01 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.count_02 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.amout_02 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.count_03 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.amout_03 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.count_04 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.amout_04 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.count_05 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.amout_05 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.count_06 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.amout_06 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.count_07 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.amout_07 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.count_08 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.amout_08 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.count_09 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.amout_09 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.count_10 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.amout_10 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.count_11 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.amout_11 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.count_12 ,sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.amout_12 ,FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.loan_type ) as loan_type ,FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.loan_type )) as loan_type_description ,'!year_1!' as year from sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month where 1=1 order by sc_rep_mis_paid_loan_by_month.loan_type
